title: Belligerent

'''''Belligerent''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] that served the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Around [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], it was stationed as part of a picket force alongside the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Vengeance (Tatooine)|''Vengeance'']] over the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] when it attempted to stop the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] ''[[Limping Lady]]'' from fleeing the world with a cargo of illegal-acquired [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]]-issue weapons. By [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]], ''Belligerent'' served with the Imperial forces controlled by the [[Imperial Advisor/Legends|Imperial Advisors]] and was [[Commander/Legends|commanded]] by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Uther Kermen]]. Kermen attempted to seize control of the planet [[Kaal/Legends|Kaal]] and its aquaculture industry during negotiations with the world's ruler, [[Tirgee Benyalle]]. Also bidding for the rights to harvest the planet's [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] were a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] delegation, [[Syndic/Legends|Syndic]] [[Talon Karrde|Pandis Hart]] of [[Sif-Uwana]], and [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Utoxx Prentioch]]. During Kermen's bid to take the planet by force—which ultimately failed due to the efforts of the New Republic's representatives—''Belligerent'' [[Battle of Kaal|engaged]] Prentioch's Star Destroyer, ''[[Prentioch]]'', in [[Space warfare/Legends|battle]] over Kaal.

==Description==
''Belligerent'' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]],<ref name="TKC" /> manufactured by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]. Like other [[Starship/Legends|vessels]] of the ''Imperial''-class, it measured 1,600 [[Meter/Legends|meters]].<ref name="NEVV" /> It was armed with [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]] and equipped with a [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]].<ref name="TKC" />

{{Unlicensedstart}}
''Belligerent''{{'s}} [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] complement included [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]]s.<ref name="LL" />
{{Unlicensedend}}

==History==
''Belligerent'' served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="TKC" />

{{Unlicensedstart}}
Around [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]],<ref name="Dating">In "[[Limping Lady (article)|Limping Lady]]," a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] in a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] questions patrons about whether or not they had knowledge of the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] and its crew, indicating the events of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] had already occurred.</ref> ''Belligerent'' was in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] over the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]],<ref name="LL" /> in the [[Arkanis sector/Legends|Arkanis sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]],<ref name="TEA-OC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> alongside the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Vengeance (Tatooine)|''Vengeance'']]. The pair acted as picket vessels and attempted to stop the launch of the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] ''[[Limping Lady]]'' from [[Docking Bay 35]] at the [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]], as the vessel was believed to be carrying crates of stolen [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]]-issue [[Heavy blaster pistol/Legends|heavy blasters]]. The two vessels transmitted orders for the ship to return to port. Upon receiving no answer, the Star Destroyers launched TIE fighters to intercept the ''Limping Lady'', but the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] managed to evade pursuit and escape into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].<ref name="LL" />
{{Unlicensedend}}

By [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]], the vessel was under the [[Commander/Legends|command]] of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Uther Kermen]]. Despite the fracturing of the Empire into [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] states following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] [[4 ABY/Legends|two years]] previously, Kermen had stayed loyal to the [[Imperial Advisor/Legends|Imperial Advisors]] ruling the remnants of the Empire. Kermen took ''Belligerent'' to the planet [[Kaal/Legends|Kaal]],<ref name="TKC" /> in the [[Yushan sector/Legends|Yushan sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="TEA-OC" /> [[Tirgee Benyalle]] had ruled the world since the Empire withdrew from the planet following the defeat at [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] and was accepting bids from various delegations over the right to harvest food from Kaal's [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] for their own purposes. Kermen was charged by the Imperial Advisors to secure the planet's bounty for the Empire. The other delegations included [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] representatives, [[Syndic/Legends|Syndic]] [[Talon Karrde|Pandis Hart]] of the [[Sif-Uwana Council]], and [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Utoxx Prentioch]], a local warlord.<ref name="TKC" />

While Kermen was on Kaal, ''Belligerent'' remained in orbit, standing off with Prentioch's own Star Destroyer, the ''[[Prentioch]]''. The crew were on full alert, prepared to counter any move that Prentioch's ship made. On the surface, Kermen made his move during the negotiations; the Admiral had no intention of peacefully negotiating for the rights to Kaal's aquaculture industry, preferring to settle the matter by force. Over the course of a [[Standard month/Legends|month]], he had infiltrated his own agents into the crew of Benyalle's [[Tirgee Benyalle's luxury sail barge|sail barge]], aboard which the final negotiations were to take place. He attacked Benyalle and the assembled delegations, but Benyalle was rescued by the New Republic representatives. Kermen's agents clashed with reinforcements summoned by Prentioch from orbit aboard the sail barge, and eventually, Syndic Pandis Hart—who was in reality the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] Talon Karrde—rescued Benyalle and the New Republic delegation, blowing up the [[Sail barge/Legends|sail barge]] at the same [[Time/Legends|time]].<ref name="TKC" />

In orbit, ''Belligerent'' and ''Prentioch'' began to [[Battle of Kaal|attack]] one another, trading turbolaser fire that was visible from the surface of the planet. The [[Space warfare/Legends|fighting]] took its toll on both vessels, and ''Belligerent'' attempted to flee the [[Star system/Legends|system]] while still shooting at the ''Prentioch'', which was likewise attempting to withdraw.<ref name="TKC" />

==Commanders and crew==
''Belligerent'' was commanded by Admiral Uther Kermen in 6 ABY. A loyalist Imperial [[Officer/Legends|officer]], he was in command of the Imperial [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] defending the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] from New Republic aggression.<ref name="TKC" />

==Behind the scenes==
''Belligerent'' first appeared in the ambiguously [[canon]] [[Roleplaying game|RPG]] adventure "[[Limping Lady (article)|Limping Lady]]" by [[Peter M. Schweighofer]], which was published in the magazine ''[[Challenge 64]]'' in [[1992]]. The vessel later appeared in ''[[The Kaal Connection]]'', which was published in [[1995]]'s [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 7|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 7]]. It was also written by Schweighofer with assistance from [[Timothy Zahn]].
